title: Dynamic bit write with signed expression fails

features.name: dynamic_bit_select_with_signed_index
features.description: Code should include a bit-select operation on a vector where the index is a computed expression involving signed integer variables used in arithmetic operations

features.name: integer_variable_in_computed_bit_select
features.description: Code should include integer-typed variables used in modulo and division operations to compute bit-select indices within a for loop
